# The Franklin Butchery

> An elevated neighborhood butcher shop in Franklin, Tennessee.

## About

The Franklin Butchery is a family-owned, elevated-experience butcher shop located at 129 2nd Avenue North, Franklin, TN 37064. Founded by the Salaber and Tirado families, we offer hand-cut meats, fresh seafood, gourmet sandwiches, curated craft beer and wine, and chef-driven meals to go. Our warm industrial aesthetic and commitment to transparency, craft, and quality create a welcoming space where guests can learn, explore, and discover exceptional food.

## Contact

- Address: 129 2nd Avenue North, Franklin, TN 37064
- Phone: (615) 721-7790
- Email: family@franklinbutchery.com
- Hours: Open Daily, 11 AM – 8 PM
- Website: https://www.franklinbutchery.com

## What We Offer

### The Butcher Case
Hand-selected, hand-cut daily from our glass cut room. Locally sourced beef, pork, lamb, poultry, house-made sausage and bacon, and jerky. Our primary beef and pork comes from Bear Creek Farm — a Tennessee local family farm raising pasture-raised cattle and hogs with no added hormones or antibiotics. Cuts include: ribeye, filet mignon, New York strip, prime rib, brisket, T-bone, porter house, tri-tip, short ribs, pork chops, baby back ribs, St. Louis ribs, tenderloin, rack of lamb, and much more. All cut to order.

### Fresh Seafood
Fresh, never-frozen seafood sourced primarily from Maine that rotates daily. Offerings include: Atlantic salmon, king salmon, sockeye salmon, halibut, Chilean sea bass, lobster (whole, tails, TCK), sea scallops, diver scallops, bay scallops, yellowfin tuna, bluefin tuna, sushi-grade loin, wild-caught Gulf shrimp, king crab legs, snow crab, lump crab meat, swordfish, branzino, red snapper, mahi mahi, cod, haddock, and more.

### Gourmet Sandwiches
Elevated sandwiches built with house-cut meats and fresh ingredients. Each sandwich is named after the owners' children and family. Made to order daily.

### Craft Beer & Wine
A curated selection of craft beer and wine chosen to pair perfectly with our hand-cut meats, fresh seafood, and gourmet sandwiches.

**Beer:** Maine Beer Co (pale ale, 5.5% ABV), Rogue Hazelnut Brown (brown ale, 5.6% ABV), Tailgate Cider (hard cider, 5.0% ABV), Tailgate Lager Project (lager, 4.8% ABV), Tailgate Orange Wheat (wheat ale, 5.0% ABV), Trillium (New England IPA, 7.2% ABV), Yazoo Gerst (amber lager, 4.9% ABV), Yazoo Hefeweizer (wheat beer, 5.0% ABV), plus seasonal rotating selections.

**Wine:** Almost Honest Cab Sav, Ciprea Pecorino, Elysian Fields Verdiccio DEI Castelli Di Jesi, Etude Pinot Gris, Etude Pinot Noir, Fidora Valpolicella, Holy Wars Marche Rosso, She-Wold Marche Rosato, Trimbach Alsace Pinot Blanc, Virgen Del Galir / Val Do Galir, White Haven Sav Blanc.

### Meals To Go
Chef-driven, refrigerated meals and sides designed to reheat beautifully at home. Meat-forward dinners, pasta-and-sauce options, and premium sides. Not a full-service restaurant — these are prepared meals you take home and enjoy.

### Private Dining & Events
Our private dining room is available for customized events: rehearsal dinners, showers, birthdays, and celebrations. Supper-club style dinners are announced via Instagram and email. Contact us with your date, headcount, and vision.

## The Team

Carlos and Greg bring years of craft and care to everything in the case — a butcher who cuts by hand and a chef who cooks from scratch. Backed by the Salaber and Tirado families who believed Franklin deserved something special.

## Sourcing & Quality

We are committed to local sourcing, traceability, and quality you can taste. Our primary meat source is Bear Creek Farm, a Tennessee family farm founded in 2007 by LeeAnn and Bill Cherry. Their cattle and hogs are pasture-raised with grain finishing, no added hormones or antibiotics, and processed at their own USDA-inspected facility (Cherry Meat Company). Our seafood is sourced fresh from Maine whenever possible.

## Also Available

- Retail add-ons: artisan cheeses, house-made "mother sauces," elevated meal components
- Roper Field branded leather goods (handmade locally)
- Lavender Row lavender products
- Franklin Butchery branded merchandise and curated dry goods
- Dry-aging room with salt wall, visible from the shop floor

## Education

We believe in being a guide, not just a shop. Our team can help you understand cuts, marbling, dry-aging, and cooking methods. Ask us about the best cut for your grill, oven, or smoker, and how much to buy for any headcount.
